creator: garmitage@swin.edu.au
text:
+1 for updating this Port with Bob Frazier's 50ms -> 250ms patch (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163749&getpatch=2)

I recently experienced an 'educational' few hours trying to figure out why my FreeBSD 9.1 box couldn't program my Uno R3 board (using Arduino IDE 1.0.3 and avrdude 5.11 from Ports). Turns out the missing link was this patch (committed upstream a year ago, http://svn.savannah.nongnu.org/viewvc?view=rev&root=avrdude&revision=1036). Manually applying the patch and rebuilding/reinstalling the avrdude Port instantly resolved my problem.

cheers,
gja
